title: Soft & Pearl Bolsius Rustic Shine Pillar Candle (190 x 68mm)
features: Inspired by Nature: Design and colors inspired by the beauty of nature
Rustic Style: Adds a touch of rustic charm to any home decor
Unscented & Long-Lasting: Enjoy a consistent, unscented flame for extended periods
Cotton Wick: Features a single cotton wick for a stable, even burn
description: Product description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 19cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, never leave unattended, monitor burn time, and dispose of properly.
